cases.description: Unspaced Traditional Chinese with person, school, organization, and full-width punctuation.
cases.text: 宋女士入學上海女子學校，畢業後任職中國婦女會。

cases.description: Distinct historical and modern variant forms must not be normalized together.
cases.text: 梁啓超與梁啟超，臺灣與台灣，裏與裡。

cases.description: A supplementary-plane CJK character tests Unicode-code-point rather than UTF-16 indexing.

warnings: These synthetic strings test Unicode offset integrity only; they are not historical annotations or NER accuracy evidence.
The OCR-confusion strings are stress cases, not claims about a measured confusion matrix.
